articles.title: Trump’s conflicting messages sow confusion over the Iran war
articles.description:
“The administration is winging it. So how can you trust what the president says?”

The post Trump’s conflicting messages sow confusion over the Iran war appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump's mixed messages on the Iran war create uncertainty for Boston residents.
Local veterans express concern over potential military escalation affecting families.
Confusion may impact Boston's defense contractors reliant on clear government policies.

articles.title: Bravo Just Dropped the first full “Real Housewives of Rhode Island” Trailer. Here’s everything we learned.
articles.description:
The first-ever Housewives series set in New England premieres April 2 at 9 p.m.

The post Bravo Just Dropped the first full “Real Housewives of Rhode Island” Trailer. Here’s everything we learned. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bravo's 'Real Housewives of Rhode Island' premieres April 2 at 9 p.m.
This marks the first Housewives series set in New England.
Boston residents may see local influences and connections in the show.
